ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the issue */,
  "issue_title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved (if applicable) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "estimated_resolution_date" TEXT /* Estimated date for resolution */,
  "reopened_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the issue has been reopened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES issue_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project (if applicable) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the recorded statistics */,
  "active_issues" INTEGER /* Number of active issues on that date */,
  "inactive_issues" INTEGER /* Number of inactive issues on that date */,
  "total_issues" INTEGER /* Total number of issues counted on that date */,
  "active_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of issues that were active on that date */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "resolved_issues" INTEGER /* Number of resolved issues on that date */,
  "reopened_issues" INTEGER /* Number of reopened issues on that date */,
  "average_resolution_time" REAL /* Average time taken to resolve issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_stats_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned to the issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved by the assigned user */,
  "reassigned_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the issue has been reassigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type (e.g., bug, feature request) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment relates to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL for any attachments related to the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private and not visible to all users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
